name: Pore Cleansing MD Face Wash
full_ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Salicylic Acid, Lactic Acid, Glycerin
description: Deep cleansing face wash with 2% Salicylic Acid for acne-prone skin. Removes excess oil and unclogs pores.
how_to_use: Use morning and night. Apply on damp face, massage gently, rinse thoroughly.
research_notes: Salicylic Acid is a BHA that penetrates pores and dissolves sebum. Clinically proven to reduce acne.

name: Vitamin C Face Serum 10%
full_ingredients: Aqua, Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol
description: Brightening serum with 10% Vitamin C to reduce pigmentation and dark spots. Safe for Indian skin tones.
how_to_use: Apply 3-4 drops on clean face in the morning. Follow with sunscreen.
research_notes: Ethyl Ascorbic Acid is a stable form of Vitamin C. Studies show 10% concentration reduces hyperpigmentation in 8 weeks.

name: Oil Free Moisturizer
full_ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Sodium Hyaluronate
description: Lightweight, oil-free moisturizer perfect for Indian humid climate. Hydrates without clogging pores.
how_to_use: Apply a pea-sized amount on clean face morning and night.
research_notes: Niacinamide helps regulate sebum production. Hyaluronic Acid provides lightweight hydration.

name: Sunscreen Gel SPF 50
full_ingredients: Aqua, Avobenzone, Octinoxate, Glycerin, Silica
description: Lightweight gel sunscreen with SPF 50. No white cast, perfect for Indian skin tones.
how_to_use: Apply generously 15 mins before sun exposure. Reapply every 3-4 hours.
research_notes: SPF 50 blocks 98% UVB rays. Gel formula is non-comedogenic and suitable for humid climates.

name: AHA BHA Peeling Solution
full_ingredients: Aqua, Glycolic Acid, Salicylic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide
description: Weekly exfoliating treatment for glowing skin. Removes dead cells and unclogs pores.
how_to_use: Use once a week at night. Apply for 10 mins, rinse thoroughly. Always use sunscreen next day.
research_notes: AHAs exfoliate surface, BHAs penetrate pores. Combined use shows 40% improvement in skin texture.

name: Plum Green Tea Cleanser
full_ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Camellia Sinensis Extract, Glycolic Acid
description: Antioxidant-rich face wash with green tea. Gently cleanses while fighting free radicals.
how_to_use: Apply on damp face, massage in circular motions, rinse well.
research_notes: Green tea polyphenols have anti-inflammatory properties. Glycolic Acid provides gentle exfoliation.

name: Plum Niacinamide Serum
full_ingredients: Aqua, Niacinamide, Zinc PCA, Glycerin
description: Pore-minimizing serum that controls oil and reduces blemishes.
